data.name: DownloadSource
data.value: Download source (this setting syncs to the plugin market)

data.name: OpenSourceRepositoryUsed
data.value: Open source repositories used by our project:

data.name: OpenFrontendDirectory
data.value: Open the frontend config file directory

data.name: OpenGameFileDirectory
data.value: Open the game file output directory

data.name: AuthorDetails
data.value: Made by Zero PLFJY | Email：zero_plfjy@outlook.com | Software feedback group(QQ): 175741665

data.name: PickingBorderImageColor
data.value: Picking border image color(It will cover the color of picking border itself)

data.name: ResetAllPersonalizationSettingsOfTheWindow
data.value: Reset all personalization settings of the window

data.name: ColorOfTalentAndTraitIcon
data.value: Color of talent and trait icon

data.name: CampIconColorInScoreStatistics
data.value: Camp icon color in score statistics

data.name: ShiftDistanceOfTotalScoreWhenSwitchingBetweenBO3AndBO5Mode
data.value: Shift distance of total score when switching between BO3 and BO5 mode

data.name: NoteScoreStatisticsNotSaveInBO3Mode
data.value: Note: All layout changes of score statistics will NOT be saved in BO3 mode

data.name: ResetSurvivorScoreLayoutInGame
data.value: Reset survivor score layout in game

data.name: ResetHunterScoreLayoutInGame
data.value: Reset hunter score layout in game

data.name: AModernIdentityVBPSoftware
data.value: A modern Identity V BP Software

data.name: ScoreInBPWindowAndGame
data.value: Score in BP window and game

data.name: JsonImportTip
data.value: This is used for fast import. The example files are neo-bpsys-wpf\Resources\队伍信息导入示例-xxx.json. Check the documentations for more details.

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantToExit
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit?

data.name: ComingSoon
data.value: How about we explore the area ahead of us later~

data.name: GuidanceNotAvailableInFree
data.value: Guidance not available in free game

data.name: ErrorWhenCleanUpResidualUpdateFiles
data.value: Error when clean up residual update files

data.name: AfterUpdateTip
data.value: If the fronted windows become disordered, please reset the layout and custom settings.

data.name: DontRemindMeAgainUntilTheNextUpdate
data.value: Don’t remind me again until the next update

data.name: SomeSettingsRequireRestartingTheApplication
data.value: Some settings require restarting the application

data.name: ErrorWhenGeneratingFrontendConfigurationFile
data.value: Error when generating frontend configuration file

data.name: CannotFindDefaultLayoutConfigurationFromWindowProvider
data.value: Cannot find the default layout configuration from window provider

data.name: UIConfigurationHasBeenSavedTo
data.value: UI configuration has been saved to

data.name: UIImportIsFinished
data.value: UI import is finished. Application will restart automatically

data.name: ResetConfigurationFileToSolveTheProblem
data.value: Reset configuration file to solve the problem

data.name: ImageMaybeDamagedOrUnsupported
data.value: Image may be damaged or unsupported

data.name: GoToSettingPageToUpdate
data.value: Go to setting page to update

data.name: GameRuleFileNotFoundError
data.value: Game rule file not found error

data.name: AreYouSureToResetMapBP
data.value: Are you sure to reset map BP?

data.name: AreYouSureToSaveTheShiftDistanceOfTotalScore
data.value: Are you sure to save the shift distance of Total Score

data.name: AreYouSureToSetCampIconTo
data.value: Are you sure to set camp icon to

data.name: AreYouSureToSetTalentAndTraitIconTo
data.value: Are you sure to set talent and trait icon to

data.name: AreYouSureToResetAllPersonalSettingsOfThisWindow
data.value: Are you sure to reset all personal settings of this window?

data.name: AreYouSureToResetPersonalSettingsOfAllWindows
data.value: Are you sure to reset personal settings of all windows?

data.name: PathHasAlreadyExistAreYouSureToCoverIt
data.value: has already exist. Are you sure to cover it?

data.name: AreYouSureToRemoveTheFileLookPhoto
data.value: Are you sure to remove the final look photo?

data.name: PluginsThirdPartyWarning
data.value: Plugins are privided by third-partys. Their availability and integrity are not guaranteed

data.name: DesignerUnlockNote
data.value: Use the independent Frontend Designer to edit layouts. Layout packages are managed in the Layout Packages tab.

data.name: UnexpectedExceptionMessage
data.value: Some unexpected errors have occurred. Please contact the developer with the log file below for solutions

data.name: SmartBpDeleteOcrModelConfirmFormat
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete OCR model: {0}?

data.name: SmartBpOcrNotReadyFirstDownloadAndSwitchModel
data.value: OCR is not ready. Please download and switch an OCR model before using this feature.

data.name: SmartBpOcrDownloadAlreadyInProgress
data.value: An OCR model download is already in progress.

data.name: SmartBpOcrDetModelMetadataEmpty
data.value: OCR detection model metadata is empty.

data.name: SmartBpOcrClsModelMetadataEmpty
data.value: OCR classification model metadata is empty.

data.name: SmartBpOcrRecModelMetadataEmpty
data.value: OCR recognition model metadata is empty.

data.name: SmartBpOcrDeleteBlockedByDownloading
data.value: Cannot delete model while download is in progress.

data.name: SmartBpOcrModelFilesIncomplete
data.value: Model files are incomplete. Please download the model first.

data.name: SmartBpOcrArchiveMissingModelFilesFormat
data.value: No usable model files were found in the model archive (expected inference.pdmodel or inference.json, with inference.pdiparams). Sample files: {0}

data.name: WindowCaptureWgcRequires1803OrLater
data.value: Windows Graphics Capture requires Windows 10 1803 or later.

data.name: WindowCaptureWgcNotSupportedOnCurrentSystem
data.value: Windows Graphics Capture is not supported on this system.

data.name: WindowCaptureSelectedWindowInvalidForCapture
data.value: The selected window is not valid for capture.

data.name: WindowCaptureFailedToCaptureFirstFrameWithBitblt
data.value: Failed to capture the first frame with Bitblt.

data.name: WindowCaptureWgcWindowCaptureRequires1903OrLaterUsePickerOn1803Or1809
data.value: Capturing by selected window requires Windows 10 1903 or later. On 1803/1809, use picker capture.

data.name: WindowCaptureGraphicsCaptureItemUnavailable
data.value: Failed to capture selected window: GraphicsCaptureItem is unavailable.

data.name: SmartBpOcrModelEnV4MobileDescription
data.value: Optimized for English scenes, suitable for English and numeric recognition. Recommended for English UI.

data.name: SmartBpOcrModelJaV4MobileDescription
data.value: Optimized for Japanese scenes, suitable for Japanese and numeric recognition.

data.name: SmartBpOcrModelZhCnV4Description
data.value: Stable compatibility with moderate deployment size.

data.name: SmartBpOcrModelZhCnV3SlimDescription
data.value: Smaller size, suitable for low-spec devices.

data.name: SmartBpRegionConfigInvalidCellCountFormat
data.value: Invalid config: row {0} must contain 6 child regions.

data.name: SmartBpRegionConfigInvalidBigRectFormat
data.value: Invalid config: row {0} parent rect is out of range.

data.name: SmartBpRegionLayoutMismatchCellCountFormat
data.value: Layout mismatch: row #{0} expected {1} cells, actual {2}.

data.name: SmartBpRegionEditorTemplateNotInGroup
data.value: Current node is not in a template group.

data.name: SmartBpRegionEditorTemplateAppliedFormat
data.value: Applied to {0} same-template elements (parent position kept).

data.name: SmartBpRegionEditorOperationHelp
data.value: How to use: 1. Drag inside region to move 2. Drag 8 handles to resize 3. Child regions are constrained inside parent 4. Preview is frozen on current frame

data.name: SmartBpRegionLayoutMismatchRootIdFormat
data.value: Layout mismatch: root #{0} should be {1}, actual {2}.

data.name: SmartBpRegionConfigInvalidCellRectFormat
data.value: Invalid config: row {0} cell {1} is out of parent range.

data.name: SmartBpRegionEditorNodeRectRootFormat
data.value: Node: {0}`nRelative rect (to frame)`nX={1:F6}, Y={2:F6}, W={3:F6}, H={4:F6}

data.name: SmartBpRegionConfigResetConfirm
data.value: Reset to built-in 16:9 default config? Current config will be overwritten.

data.name: SmartBpRegionEditorRequireCaptureFirst
data.value: Please start capture before editing regions.

data.name: SmartBpRegionAspectHintNotStarted
data.value: Start capture first, then check aspect ratio.

data.name: SmartBpRegionAspectHintWaitingFirstFrame
data.value: Capture started. Waiting for first frame to evaluate aspect ratio.

data.name: SmartBpRegionEditorRuleRuntimeFormat
data.value: Current structure: {0} editable nodes (any depth and count supported)

data.name: SmartBpRegionLayoutMismatchRootCountFormat
data.value: Layout mismatch: expected {0} root regions, actual {1}.

data.name: SmartBpRegionEditorNodeRectChildFormat
data.value: Node: {0}`nRelative rect (to parent)`nX={1:F6}, Y={2:F6}, W={3:F6}, H={4:F6}

data.name: SmartBpRegionAspectHintMismatched
data.value: Capture aspect ratio differs from config. Open "Edit Regions (GameData)" and adjust manually.

data.name: SmartBpRegionEditorRuleDefault
data.value: Current rule: 1 parent region + 6 child regions per row

data.name: SmartBpRegionConfigInvalidScene
data.value: Invalid config: scene must be GameData.

data.name: SmartBpRegionConfigImportFileNotFound
data.value: Import failed: config file does not exist.

data.name: SmartBpRegionConfigInvalidRowCount
data.value: Invalid config: exactly 5 parent regions are required.

data.name: SmartBpRegionAspectHintMatched
data.value: Aspect ratio matched. Ready to use.

data.name: SmartBpRegionConfigImportEmpty
data.value: Import failed: config content is empty.

data.name: SmartBpRegionConfigExportPathEmpty
data.value: Export failed: target path cannot be empty.

data.name: PluginMarketMirrorSyncHint
data.value: This setting syncs to app updates

data.name: PluginMarketDownloadQueueEmpty
data.value: No plugin downloads are queued right now

data.name: PluginMarketInstallBlockedHostVersionTooLow
data.value: The current app version is too low to install this plugin.

data.name: PluginMarketSha256Mismatch
data.value: Integrity check failed for {0}. Installation was blocked for your safety.

data.name: AppUpdateHashFileMissing
data.value: The update package is missing its SHA-256 file. Download was stopped.

data.name: AppUpdateInvalidHashFile
data.value: The SHA-256 file for this update is invalid. Installation was stopped.

data.name: AppUpdateSha256Mismatch
data.value: Integrity check failed for the update installer. Installation was blocked for your safety.

data.name: InvalidControlName
data.value: Control name cannot be empty and must match ^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$.

data.name: DuplicateControlName
data.value: A control with this name already exists in this canvas.

data.name: ReferencedControlRenameBlocked
data.value: This control is referenced by another control. Reference-aware rename will be implemented later.

data.name: CannotAddControl
data.value: Cannot add a control right now.

data.name: CannotDeleteReferencedControl
data.value: This control is still referenced by another control and cannot be deleted.

data.name: UnsavedChangesMessage
data.value: The current layout has unsaved changes.

data.name: SaveBeforeSwitch
data.value: The current layout has unsaved changes. Save before continuing?

data.name: SaveBeforeClose
data.value: The current layout has unsaved changes. Save before closing?

data.name: ResetLayoutConfirm
data.value: Reset to built-in layout? Current custom layout will be removed.

data.name: CanvasSizeMustBePositive
data.value: Canvas width and height must be greater than 0

data.name: SaveBeforeRestart
data.value: Save the current layout before restarting?

data.name: PackageNotImplemented
data.value: v3 package import will be implemented in Phase 9D.

data.name: CannotDeleteLocalPackage
data.value: Cannot delete the local resource package.

data.name: PackageActivationNotImplemented
data.value: This package cannot be activated yet.

data.name: InvalidPackageId
data.value: PackageId may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, dot, dash, and underscore, with no whitespace, path separators, colon, or ...

data.name: ConfirmOverwriteFile
data.value: The output file already exists. Overwrite it?

data.name: ReplaceExistingPackage
data.value: A package with the same PackageId already exists. Replace it?

data.name: ActivateImportedPackage
data.value: The package was imported. Activate it now?

data.name: LegacyPackageConversionNotImplemented
data.value: Legacy .bpui conversion is not implemented yet.

data.name: PackageRequiresNewerVersion
data.value: This package requires a newer app version.

data.name: CrossPackageResourceReference
data.value: The package contains a cross-package resource reference.

data.name: MissingPackageResource
data.value: The package is missing a resource file.

data.name: ConfirmActivatePackage
data.value: Activating this package will overwrite current user frontend layouts. Continue?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteActivePackage
data.value: This package is active. Delete it and switch to the built-in layout?

data.name: LegacyPackageConvertMessage
data.value: A legacy .bpui layout package was detected. Convert it to a Designer v3 package and import it? The legacy Config.json will not overwrite current app settings.

data.name: LegacyPackageDefaultDescription
data.value: Converted from a legacy .bpui package. Legacy fields without a safe mapping are ignored.

data.name: InputTruncated
data.value: Input was truncated to the length limit

data.name: PackageExtractedTooLarge
data.value: Extracted package content is too large

data.name: WindowOptionsTooLarge
data.value: Window options JSON is too large

data.name: TooManyControls
data.value: Too many controls on this canvas

data.name: ControlCountLimitReached
data.value: Control count limit reached for this canvas

data.name: Designer.PluginInstallGuidance
data.value: This plugin is not installed. Install guidance will be available in Phase 13E.

data.name: MissingPluginImportMessage
data.value: This layout package references plugin controls that are not registered in the current app. Missing controls will not render; cancel the import or force import and remove them.

data.name: MissingPluginMarketLater
data.value: Plugin marketplace install/update guidance is Phase 13E. This phase will not download or install plugins automatically.

data.name: ForceImportRemoveMissingControls
data.value: Force import and remove missing controls

data.name: RemovedPluginControlsReport
data.value: Plugin controls removed by force import

data.name: PluginDependencyInstallAvailableMessage
data.value: Plugins that can be installed or updated from the plugin market require user confirmation.

data.name: PluginDependencyForceImportMessage
data.value: You can force import and remove these plugin controls. The original .bpui file will not be modified.

data.name: PluginDependencyInstallRestartNotice
data.value: Installing or updating plugins usually requires a restart, and the current import will not continue automatically.

data.name: PluginDependencyInstallIncomplete
data.value: The plugin install queue ended with unfinished dependencies

data.name: ExamplePlugin.TeamCard.Description
data.value: DEBUG example plugin control that displays a team name and logo from shared data bindings.
